children.heading: Requirement to define
children.label: a Requirement to define
children.text: For purposes of this part, the term “geographic area” shall have such meaning as the Secretary shall by notice provide.

children.heading: Issuance of notice
children.label: b Issuance of notice
children.text: Not later than the expiration of the 90-day period beginning on , the Secretary shall issue a notice setting forth the definition required by subsection (a).July 29, 2016
